$current_shift.description: Current shift assigned to the user

$next_shift.description: Next shift assigned to the user

Current_Shift__s.description: To update current shift for the user

oneOf.description: Current shift ID to be updated

confirm.description: Indicates whether the user has accepted the invitation

oneOf.description: Status of the user in get
Details of the user who created this user
Time when the user was created

microsoft.description: Indicates whether the user is a Microsoft user

oneOf.description: Details of the user who last modified this user details
Time when the user was last modified

sandboxDeveloper.description: Indicates whether the user is a sandbox developer

language.description: User's language. Can be updated only by the same user

enum: disabled due to license limit reached
disabled due to record is in recycle bin

oneOf.description: ID of the user to whom the reporting is to be assigned
Null value to remove reporting to assignment

share_among_subordinates.description: Indicates whether to share records with subordinates

time_zone.description: User's time zone. Can only be updated by the same user

default_tab_group.description: Default tab group for the user.

personal_account.description: Indicates whether the user has a personal account

notes_desc.description: Indicates whether notes description is enabled

show_left_panel.description: Indicates whether left panel is shown

show_detail_view.description: Indicates whether detail view is shown

more_records.description: Indicates if more records are available
